2.0.0: Cover images are now stored at higher resolution for sharper display on high-DPI screens
To get higher quality covers for existing series, refresh them via the edit dialog or re-upload custom covers
Performance improvements across string handling, bitmap memory, and reactive subscriptions
Added version changelog popup on new updates
Added Refresh Series button to mass refresh series data and covers
Added Refresh Covers toggle in Preferences to re-download covers on single series refresh
